summary: All 5 critical bugs verified as FIXED. Chapter numbering now starts at 1 (not 13+), reader shows full paragraphs, chapter navigation works, script toggles functional, translation system active. Backend 12/12 tests passed, Frontend UI fully functional.
passed_tests: Chapter numbering starts at 1 for Alice (12 chapters) and Moby Dick (151 chapters)
Chapter IDs are correct: alice-in-wonderland-ch1, moby-dick-ch1
Reader shows full chapter content (25 sentences for Alice Ch1, not fragmented)
Full paragraphs displayed instead of single sentences
Translation system active - sentences have kanji, hiragana, romaji translations
Script toggle buttons work: 漢字 → ひらがな → カタカナ → Romaji → EN
Homepage shows books with correct chapter counts
Stats section shows accurate totals (468 total chapters across 5 books)
Book cards display Japanese titles with correct chapter counts
seed_data_creation: None required - existing books used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 critical bugs are now fixed: (1) Chapter numbering starts at 1, (2) Full paragraphs shown in reader, (3) Translation system active with worker running, (4) Script toggles work for all modes, (5) Library shows correct chapter counts. Books available: alice-in-wonderland (12 ch), moby-dick (151 ch), pride-and-prejudice (61 ch), anna-karenina (243 ch), rashomon (1 ch).
